# ctyun_redis_backups (Data Source)
-> 详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10029420/10142282



## Example

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ctyun = {
      source = "ctyun-it/ctyun"
    }
  }
}

# 可参考index.md，在环境变量中配置ak、sk、资源池ID、可用区名称
provider "ctyun" {
  env = "prod"
}

data "ctyun_redis_backups" "test"{
    instance_id = "3f40648b0d7f4ec4beb82657bd4fbcc6"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) 实例ID

### Optional

- `name` (String) 备份名，用于精确查询特定备份
- `region_id` (String) 资源池ID

### Read-Only

- `rows` (Attributes List) 备份列表 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rows))

<a id="nestedatt--rows"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rows`

Read-Only:

- `create_time` (String) 创建时间（格式：yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss）
- `name` (String) 备份名
- `recovery_status` (String) 备份恢复状态: success(成功), processing(进行中), fail(失败), create(备份点创建)
- `remark` (String) 备注信息
- `status` (String) 节点状态: success(成功), processing(进行中), fail(失败)
- `type` (Number) 备份类型: 0(手动备份), 1(自动备份)
